mano_cua.result_summary: 在Dnd Kit Storybook中经过完整导航树搜索（含搜索关键词fixed、scroll、overlay），未找到包含fixed定位可滚动容器与可排序可滚动放置区域组合的目标功能入口。现有故事仅含基础拖拽/排序场景，不包含任务描述的特定交互场景。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Now I can see the "Scroll Container" story with the outline mode enabled. I can see that items 1-6 are shown with blue outline borders indicating the container structure. The container appears to have a red border (scroll container) with the items inside it. The story shows a vertical sortable list within a scroll container - no fixed positioned container. This "Scroll Container" story (Presets/Sortable/Vertical) shows a simple scrollable sortable list, which is NOT the specific scenario with: 1. A fixed positioned scrollable container 2. A sortable droppable area 3. Testing DragOverlay position tracking. Based on my thorough exploration of the Storybook navigation, none of the available stories specifically implement the described scenario. The closest stories are "Scroll Container" under Vertical/Horizontal/Grid, but they only show a basic scrollable sortable list, not the combined scenario described.
